intended_use: EchoGo Amyloidosis 1.0 is an automated machine learning-based decision support system, indicated as a screening tool for adult patients aged 65 years and over with heart failure undergoing cardiovascu
intended_use_full: EchoGo Amyloidosis 1.0 is an automated machine learning-based decision support system, indicated as a screening tool for adult patients aged 65 years and over with heart failure undergoing cardiovascular assessment using echocardiography. When utilised by an interpreting physician, this device provides information alerting the physician for referral to confirmatory investigations.
ground_truth: Reference ground truth from independent clinical validation study; device output compared to reference standard to demonstrate validity of modeling
other_metrics: Positive Predictive Value at 2.2% prevalence: 15.6% (95% CI: 11.0%, 20.8%); Negative Predictive Value at 2.2% prevalence: 99.6% (95% CI: 99.5%, 99.7%); Repeatability - Positive Agreement: 100%, Negative Agreement: 100%; Reproducibility - Positive Agreement: 85.5% (95% CI: 82.4%, 88.2%), Negative Agreement: 79.9% (95% CI: 76.5%, 83.2%); No-classification rate: 14.0%
